untranslatable_reason: Head-and-shoulders pattern detection with specific time-ratio validation (max_penetration_time_ratio: 1.5, reference_period: A_to_E_duration) requires multi-bar pattern recognition and time-span measurement between identified pattern points A, B, C, D, E. The allowed indicator set does not include pattern detection or inter-point time measurement capabilities. Pattern geometry (horizontal symmetry D2 < 2.5 D1) cannot be expressed with available OHLCV and technical indicators alone. A custom pattern recognition module would be required.
translation_notes: Signal attempts to encode a classical head-and-shoulders reversal pattern with temporal validation. The core logic—volume-confirmed neckline penetration as entry, with pattern invalidation on time threshold exceedance—has been approximated using pivot-level crosses with volume confirmation. However, this is a significant simplification that loses the specific geometric and temporal constraints of the original pattern rule. The time-ratio constraint (1.5x A-to-E duration) and the symmetry validation (D2 < 2.5 D1) cannot be reliably translated without pattern recognition.
